Festival.Name: Sleep Token Live Concert
Festival.StartMessage: The Sleep Token Live Concert has started on the Beach.
Aviroen.SleepToken: Sleep Token Live Concert Festival Area
x1Line: Won't you come and dance in the dark with me?
x2Line: Show me what you are, I am desperate to know~
x3Line: Nobody better than the perfect enemy~
x4Line: Digital demons make the night feel heavenly~
2x1Line: You have become the voice in my head~
2x2Line: Only recourse we're left after death~
3x3Line: I want to see the other side~
3x4Line: Won't you show me what it's like?~
4x2Line: Garner you in silk like a spider~
4x3Line: Roll a die, you bet, I'm a rider~
4x4Line: Your outer shell, your secret insider~
Vessel.Beach_2: Pelican Town's been so nice to us!
Vessel.Beach_3: So let's get swallowed whole~!#$b#I wanna go where nobody else will ever go~!$1
ShopOpen1: The bass of the music really makes one thirsty.
Map_1: %'I can't believe they're hosting a show here!'
Map_2: %'Caught a boat from Central Station to get here!'
Map_3: %'The trains took awhile, but I'm glad I made it!'
Map_5: %'Never thought I'd get to see a metal show in Pelican Town!'
Map_7: %'We've all agreed to not mosh, respectfully.'
Map_9: %'I wonder if that one band from here is still going...?'
Map_9Alt: 'I wonder if that one band from here is still going...?'
Map_10: %'I bought tickets for both days, couldn't miss this!'
Map_11: %'These shows are always so fun with how much movement happens!'
Map_12: %'The fireworks are just for show, but they're so fun to kick off!'
Sebastian.Day1_0: Maru said she wanted to be in my life some more, so I figured I'd invite her to this metal show.$h#$b#I hope she likes it.$h
Sebastian.Day1_1: Been listening to them on and off but live just hits different.$h#${{TAH}} Sebastian "Half-algorithm, half-deity!" 1000 0 true
Sebastian.Day1_Over: So, how was it, Maru?$h#${{DBF}}It was great! The pyrotechnics especially-$h{{DBMar}}#$b#...Well I'm glad.$h
Maru.Day1_0: Seb invited me because I asked about his likes.$h#$b#I'm not well versed in metal music... but they do have a lot of interesting devices for effect.$4
Maru.Day1_1: It's so... loud!$9#$b#But also so fun!$h
Maru.Day1_Over: The pyrotechnics especially, the fact that we can have these fireworks up close is such an interesting device-$4
Abigail.Day1_0: The snacks here are so cheap, it's almost too tempting.$h
Abigail.Day1_1: I was allowed to play along with my flute.$4
Abigail.Day1_Over: The masks, the fireworks, the stage atmosphere--Sam we have to-$7#${{DBF}}Yeah, I'm so stoked for our own gig to be this big.$h{{DBSam}}
Sam.Day1_0: Seb and Abi thought that seeing other talents that have been around would give me more inspiration.$h
Sam.Day1_1: The atmosphere of this place is over the top!$8
Sam.Day1_Over: Gosh, I just hope that our band will someday get this big.$10
Shane.Day1_0: 'Sup?#$e#Cold beer, head shaking music, nothing quite like live shows.$h
Shane.Day1_1: Glad I could take the time to see this show for myself, this is great.$h
Shane.Day1_Over: The allure of not knowing who the band members are and not being judged...$6
Leah.Day1_0: Metal shows?#$e#I love them!$h#$b#I stopped listening for awhile because of my ex.$7#$b#I was the one that introduced the genre, but then I realized, it's MY thing.$2#$b#And I'm not gonna let someone who stifled me like that ruin it for me!$h#${{TAH}} Leah "Man, that felt great to let out." 1000 0 true
Leah.Day1_1: The inspiration, the masks, the music, I missed all of this.$h#${{TAH}} Leah "Diamonds in the trees, pentagrams in the night sky!" 1000 0 true
Leah.Day1_Over: Hopefully we can convince Lewis to keep this as a yearly gig.$4#$b#They just fuel so much inspiration in me!$h
